job_posting: Paste everything from the job URL here — title, company, location, full description, requirements, nice-to-haves.

rationale.chatgpt: Observations about THIS document only. What makes it this score? Phrase as specifics, not rules.

key_strengths: Example: summary names the target role clearly
Example: bullets are scoped and metric-backed
key_weaknesses: Example: skills section is one long ungrouped line
specific_fixes: Optional: concrete edits that would raise the score
tier_definition_match: Why this tier fits (e.g. matches mid: usable but obviously generated).
